explanations.3: The 'build' section tells Docker to create an image by reading instructions from a Dockerfile in the specified context (current directory).
explanations.6: Port mapping syntax: the first number (80) is what you access on your computer, the second number (80) is the port inside the container that nginx actually listens on.
explanations.9: A volume mount shares a folder from your computer (./src) with the container (/usr/share/nginx/html) so changes you make locally appear inside the container without rebuilding.
